title: SQL query kills the mserver5 (Segmentation fault)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR, nullable_value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, nullable_value) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, nullable_value) VALUES (2, 'example', 'data');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 'test');
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE nullable_value IS NULL AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 'example');
key_bug_features: SQL query with nested SELECT causes segmentation fault
